title.en: China-to-Japan Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入日本：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入日本：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Japan's PSE / DENAN electrical safety framework, Top Runner energy efficiency rules under the Energy Conservation Act, fluorocarbon controls, JIS B 8615, JIS C 9612, and METI-administered market obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与日本PSE / DENAN电气安全框架、《节能法》下领跑者能效规则、氟碳管制、JIS B 8615、JIS C 9612及METI主管市场义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與日本PSE / DENAN電氣安全框架、《節能法》下領跑者能效規則、氟碳管制、JIS B 8615、JIS C 9612及METI主管市場義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, registered conformity assessment body decision, METI filing, Top Runner calculation, fluorocarbon handling guidance, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current DENAN scope, PSE marking route, Top Runner target categories, JIS editions, fluorocarbon obligations, and Japanese-language labelling requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、注册符合性评定机构决定、METI申报、领跑者计算、氟碳处理指导、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行DENAN适用范围、PSE标志路径、领跑者目标品类、JIS版本、氟碳义务及日文标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、註冊符合性評定機構決定、METI申報、領跑者計算、氟碳處理指導、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行DENAN適用範圍、PSE標誌路徑、領跑者目標品類、JIS版本、氟碳義務及日文標籤要求。

answer_first.en: PSE / DENAN applicability, Top Runner energy efficiency obligations for applicable air conditioners and heat-pump products, fluorocarbon controls under Japan's Fluorocarbons Emission Control Act, and re-testing or documentation alignment to JIS B 8615 and JIS C 9612 are the major Japan compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps.
answer_first.zh: PSE / DENAN适用性、适用空调和热泵产品的领跑者能效义务、日本《氟碳排放抑制法》下的氟碳管制，以及按JIS B 8615和JIS C 9612重新测试或调整文件，是中国空气源热泵进入日本的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: PSE / DENAN適用性、適用空調和熱泵產品的領跑者能效義務、日本《氟碳排放抑制法》下的氟碳管制，以及按JIS B 8615和JIS C 9612重新測試或調整文件，是中國空氣源熱泵進入日本的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, Japanese standards body, primary legal source, or METI/ANRE/MOE source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
